name: Charter Hall Group
analysis: CHC has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 10% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$22.5100. Trade idea: entry A$23.1200, stop A$19.3347, target A$25.5100 (0.63:1) — then trail it.
